历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for science/physics category were approximately 6872 → 17151 → 12755 → 11530 → 8796, showing significant fluctuations. A sharp drop occurred in 2022 (17151), followed by a gradual recovery, reaching 8796 in 2025, with a cumulative advance of about 8355 positions over the past three years, indicating intensifying competition. The university's enrollment plan for science/physics category in Gansu: 40 in 2021, 40 in 2022, 33 in 2023, 21 in 2024, and 23 in 2025, showing a reduction followed by a slight rebound. The 2026 plan increases to 29, an expansion of about 26% compared to 2025, which may somewhat alleviate competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Nanjing Normal University is a 211 Project and Double First-Class university. In the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, it ranks 58th, with recent rankings stable in the 58–61 range, placing it at an upper-middle level, which maintains stable appeal to candidates. In 2026, its reputation evaluation is clearly negative, mainly due to teacher ethics incidents (e.g., a vice dean dismissed for extramarital affairs), which may somewhat suppress some candidates' willingness to apply. Its Douyin comprehensive popularity ranking is 69th, rated as average, with medium-low short video exposure. It has five A-level disciplines: Geography (A), Education (A), Marxist Theory (A), Chinese Language and Literature (A-), and Foreign Languages and Literatures (A-), with strong strengths in teacher training and humanities/social sciences, positively attracting applicants to related majors.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: STEM majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering are highly popular/recommended in society. However, the university's enrollment majors in Gansu for science are mainly Mathematics, Automation, Artificial Intelligence, and Energy and Power, partially overlapping with popular directions. In 2026, the total number of regular college entrance exam takers in Gansu is about 218,700, a significant increase from 2025. Based on historical proportions, physics category candidates are estimated at about 147,600, a year-on-year increase of about 21.5%, raising competitive pressure. Nanjing Normal University is located in Nanjing, Jiangsu Province, an eastern developed region, which has some regional appeal to Gansu candidates. The university's enrollment scale in Gansu is small (only 23 in 2025), making it cross-provincial enrollment without local preference.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 8796, the 2026 enrollment expansion of about 26% (alleviating competition), the increase in Gansu candidate numbers by about 21.5% (intensifying competition), and the limited suppression from negative reputation signals. Given that the increase in candidate numbers and the enrollment expansion roughly offset each other, and the 2025 ranking has clearly advanced, the predicted minimum ranking for 2026 is about 10093, with a range of 9593–10593.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Predicted ranking around 10093, range 9593–10593. Candidates with rankings within the lower bound (9593) can focus on sprinting for Tier 1 popular majors like Mathematics, Artificial Intelligence, and Electrical Engineering and Automation. Those with rankings in the middle of the range (around 10000) are advised to primarily target Tier 2 majors such as Automation, Statistics, and Energy and Power. Candidates with rankings near the upper bound (10593) may consider Tier 3 majors as safety options. The university's science majors lean towards mathematics and engineering, with some overlap with current popular societal directions (Electronic Information, Electrical, Computer), making the overall application value relatively high.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for liberal arts/history category were approximately 964 → 968 → 7549 → 1603 → 947. In 2023, there was a severe gap (7549), which quickly recovered to 1603 in 2024 and further improved to 947 in 2025, approaching the 2021–2022 level, with a cumulative advance of about 6602 positions in the last two years, showing strong recovery momentum; the university's enrollment plan for liberal arts/history category in Gansu Province: 18 in 2021, 18 in 2022, 15 in 2023, 8 in 2024, and 5 in 2025, showing a continuous reduction trend; the 2026 plan significantly increases to 11, a 120% expansion compared to 2025, which greatly alleviates competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class university, ranked 58th in the 2026 Soft Science Ranking, second only to Beijing Normal University and East China Normal University among national normal universities, with a stable level; the 2026 reputation evaluation is clearly negative, but the negative incidents mainly involve science and engineering departments (School of Environment), with relatively limited direct impact on liberal arts major applications; Douyin popularity is average, with moderate short video exposure; Chinese Language and Literature A-, Education A, Marxist Theory A, Geography A, Foreign Language and Literature A-, among which Chinese Language and Literature, Education, and Marxist Theory are highly matched with liberal arts enrollment majors, with outstanding disciplinary strength.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Chinese language/Chinese literature majors are socially recommended, teacher training/education majors are divided and wait-and-see, law is divided and wait-and-see; the university's liberal arts enrollment majors mainly include Chinese Language and Literature, Ideological and Political Education (Teacher Training), History, and Primary Education (Teacher Training), which highly correspond to its advantageous disciplines; the total number of examinees in Gansu Province in 2026 increases, with an estimated 71,100 history category examinees, a year-on-year increase of about 21.8%, raising competitive pressure; in 2026; Nanjing is located in the core area of the Yangtze River Delta, with strong regional appeal to liberal arts examinees; the university's liberal arts enrollment scale in Gansu is very small (only 5 in 2025), typical of cross-provincial enrollment.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 947, the significant 120% enrollment expansion in 2026 (significantly alleviating competition), the increase of history category examinees in Gansu Province by about 21.8% (intensifying competition), and the rapid recovery of rankings from the gap to historical lows. Given that the expansion rate far exceeds the examinee increase rate, and the 2025 ranking is already close to the historical minimum (around 964), further advancement is limited. It is predicted that the minimum ranking in 2026 will be about 1579, with a range of 1295–1863.
